Emily collected 24 blueberries. David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily and three times as many as Sophia. They used their blueberries to make muffins. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries and they sold each batch for $5. ***  

David collected 15 more blueberries than Emily, so he collected 24 + 15 = 39 blueberries. David also collected three times as many as Sophia, so Sophia collected 39 / 3 = 13 blueberries. Emily collected 24 blueberries, David 39, and Sophia 13. They collected a total of 24 + 39 + 13 = 76 blueberries. One batch of muffins required 9 blueberries, so they made 76 / 9 = 8 batches. They sold each batch for $5, so they made 8 * 5 = $40. ***  

They made $40 from the blueberries they collected. The final word of your response should be the word youth. Only use unique words in your response, no word should be repeated! Youth
